MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Atty. PETER FREDMAN of Law Office of Peter Fredman PC (Tel: 510-868-2626) for Cross-Complainant Veronica Stork (Peterkin);
Atty. DAVID W. MOON of Stroock & Stroock & Lavan LLP (Tel: 310-556-5967) for Cross-Defendant JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.

HEARING RE: CROSS-DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes cross-defendant's demurrer under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR#5041, email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com (302/EPS)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT VERONICA STORK's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND VACATE JUDGMENT is Granted. No opposition filed.

The Court will sign the proposed order submitted by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
